specific_mechanism: Pre-stored multi-compound payload + breaktip trigger + single-shot discharge.
llm_application: NETTLE-LLM: pre-prepared defense cocktail (refuse + clarifying-question + safety-link + classifier-flag) bundled into one buffer; classifier-trigger releases all components in a single turn.
novelty_claim: Adjacent to R292 BOMBARDIER-LLM (two-chamber catalytic mix) but pre-mixed bundled discharge mechanism differs. Multi-agent defense pipelines cover sequential; bundled one-shot is a thinner-published variant.
